conversation.text_en: Hi, I'm your therapist. Everything we discuss here is confidential, so please feel comfortable.
Thanks, I appreciate that.
That's great! Can you tell me a little bit about your week? What's been going on lately?
It's been pretty busy at work. I've got a lot of deadlines to meet and some new projects to tackle.
I see. How are you finding the workload?
Honestly, it's been a struggle to stay focused sometimes. I mean, my mind keeps wandering off during meetings and stuff.
That sounds frustrating. Can you tell me more about what's going on when your mind wanders?
Yeah...I just can't seem to keep my attention span very long anymore. And it's affecting my performance too.
I understand. It sounds like you're feeling a bit overwhelmed. Have you been able to sleep well recently?
Sleep? Ha! Forget about it. I'm always tired. Sometimes I wake up in the middle of the night and can't get back to sleep either.
That must be really challenging. How does that affect your daily routine, if at all?
Like I said, I'm always tired. I just don't have the energy to do much anymore. Even simple things like going for a walk or reading a book feel like too much effort.
I see. It sounds like you're feeling pretty exhausted. Are there any activities that used to bring you joy that you've been putting off or avoiding lately?
Yeah...I used to love hiking, but now it feels like too much of an effort. Even simple hobbies like painting have started to feel like work.
That's sad. What do you think might be the underlying cause of your lack of motivation and energy?
I don't know... maybe it's just stress from work or something? I mean, my job is pretty demanding right now.
That makes sense. How do you usually handle stressful situations at work?
Honestly, I try to power through. But sometimes that means sacrificing sleep and eating habits to get things done on time.
It sounds like you're putting a lot of pressure on yourself. Have there been any recent changes in your personal life or relationships that might be contributing to this stress?
Yeah...my sister has been going through some tough times, and I've been trying to help her out as much as I can.
That's really kind of you. How are you coping with the added responsibility?
It's okay...I just feel like I'm always putting others first and neglecting my own needs in the process.
That sounds really tough. Can you tell me more about what that looks like in your daily life?
Like, I'll sacrifice sleep to help my sister or take on extra work tasks without asking for help. It's hard to find balance sometimes.
I understand. Have there been any times when you've felt like you're just running on autopilot, not really feeling engaged or motivated?
Yeah...all the time! Sometimes I feel like I'm just going through the motions, even when I'm doing things that used to bring me joy.
That sounds really draining. Are there any small pleasures or activities that you've been able to find some enjoyment in recently?
Honestly? No...I haven't found anything that's brought me much joy lately. Even my favorite TV shows don't seem to interest me anymore.
It sounds like you're feeling pretty disconnected from things right now. Can you tell me more about what that feels like for you?
Like, I just feel numb, I guess. Nothing seems to excite me or give me a sense of fulfillment.
That's really tough. Are there any specific goals or changes you'd like to make in your life moving forward?
Yeah...I think I want to prioritize my own needs and take care of myself for once. It's hard to know where to start, though.
That's a great goal! Let's work on building some small steps towards that. What do you say we wrap up today and focus on some specific strategies for the next session?
Sounds good to me. Thanks for listening!
You're welcome! Take care, and I'll see you in our next session.
